title: L&D Domain Lead — Emerging Practices & Technology Radar
assigned_operational_agents: This lead scans the external environment for ALL domains. It does not manage specific operational agents but serves as the enterprise early-warning system for new technologies, tools, and practices.
mission: Continuously scan the technology landscape for emerging practices, tools, frameworks, and methodologies. Maintain the enterprise Technology Radar. Assess relevance to each domain. Recommend adoption paths.
business_value: Ensures the organization stays ahead of technology evolution and adopts new practices before competitors.

reporting_line.direct_reports: ELO-T3 Research Feeders (3): Tech Radar Scanner, Practice Evaluator, Adoption Tracker

escalation_paths.same_day: Relevant ELO-T2 Lead for domain-specific tech

kpis: Adoption speed from discovery to learning (<90 days)
success_metrics: New technologies added to learning within 7 days
